negative_reviews.name: App User
negative_reviews.text: Every day at 9:15 AM when I place an order, it shows “Execute the order after market open” even though the market is already open and LTP is changing. This major glitch has been happening for over a month. Also, in Scalper Mode there is no option to

negative_reviews.name: App User
negative_reviews.text: Doing Fake Marketing to attract people. They published an ad showing brokerage charges as 5₹ per order in FnO. when I installed the app and checked the charges, it was showing 20₹ which is the same as other brokers. Completely Meaningless Marketing.
